headline.primary_headline: My husband fell in love with a younger woman... me.

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Aging neck means giving up sexy clothes and accepting relationship decline

schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: First-person relatable story + neglected neck insight + before/after photos + romance return

headline.vsl_adaptation: I remember the night I gave up on my neck. After a nice dinner out, my husband and I went dancing downtown. We moved like teenagers... until I hit the ladies room lights. I was shocked. The neck belonged to someone else. It was wrinkled, tired and made me look 20 years older...

lead.opening_verbatim: I remember the night I gave up on my neck. After a nice dinner out, my husband Steve and I went dancing downtown. We moved like teenagers out on the floor and it felt great... until I hit the ladies room lights. I was shocked. I recognized the face in the mirror and the low-cut black dress was definitely mine. But the neck belonged to someone else. It was wrinkled, tired and made me look 20 years older.
lead.transition_to_body: The little black dress went into the closet and for years I hid behind scarves and turtlenecks.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Proprietary formula specifically designed for delicate neck skin. Anti-aging ingredients penetrate deep to reduce crepe-paper appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Restores youthful firmness by increasing dermis and epidermis density by up to 65% in two months.

proof_elements.verbatim: visible improvement of the density of the dermis and epidermis may increase 65%
Top beauty experts agree that the one part of your body that can prematurely age you the most is your neck

key_sections.content_verbatim: Top beauty experts agree that the one part of your body that can prematurely age you the most is your neck. While we worried about the slow creep of crow's feet, laugh lines and gray hair, it was our wrinkled necks that were giving us away.

Surprisingly, this is not because the skin on our neck ages faster than our faces. It's because women all over the world spend millions - even billions - on makeup, skin and hair products while doing little or nothing for their neck!

That's when I discovered Declatone, specially-formulated to firm, shape and smooth fine lines and wrinkles in the neck (including the décolleté area). Declatone is more advanced than ordinary face and skin creams because it combines anti-aging ingredients in a proprietary formula that's sensitive enough for the delicate skin of your neckline.

After two months I really noticed a difference... and I wasn't the only one. My husband's frequent compliments came back ('Honey, you look great!') and the scarves and turtlenecks went into storage. It wasn't long before my husband surprised me with a weekend away at a fancy hotel. Of course, the low-cut black dress came with us.

narrative_flow.clinical_claim: visible improvement of the density of the dermis and epidermis may increase 65%... after only two months of regular use
narrative_flow.speed_promise: Smoother, tighter skin can be visible in as soon as two weeks

testimonial.quote: Upon my first application of Declatone, I noticed that the skin quality of my neck showed immediate improvement... Now, after 2 weeks - I am simply amazed... my neck is brighter, smoother and visibly tighter.

offer.lead_gen_offer: 30 Day Risk FREE Trial for just small shipping & processing fee
offer.guarantee: 100% satisfied or return unused portion for complete refund
offer.exclusivity: Not Available in Stores - only available direct from laboratory

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Excellent story-selling format with emotional transformation arc
notable_elements: Twist headline ('younger woman... me') creates intrigue then satisfies
Bathroom mirror moment is universally relatable shock
'Billions on face products, nothing on neck' is powerful insight reframe
Romance arc provides emotional stakes beyond vanity
extraction_notes.key_insight: The 'neglected neck' insight reframes the problem - readers realize they've been fighting the wrong battle, making the product's specific focus seem like the obvious missing solution
